morningIntention: How are you feeling right now as you start the day?
If today brings more waiting on the job search, what's one thing within your control you want to stay focused on?
When the self-critical voice shows up today, what do you want your first response to be?
eveningReflection: How did today actually go for you?
What's one thing from today you want to give yourself a little credit for?
What's one worry you can set down before bed tonight?

items.title: Evening Reflection
items.prompt: A quick check-in on how the callback news sat with you today — and what you can set down before bed.

items.title: Pema Chödrön
items.author: Pema Chödrön
items.body: You are the sky. Everything else — it's just the weather.

items.title: Morning Intention
items.answer: Let myself be a little excited about the second-round callback, and prep three stories — without pinning my whole self to the outcome.
items.soniaResponse: You earned that callback, Sarah. Hold both: real hope, and the truth that your worth isn't riding on their decision.
